commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=00ce92a7ebc6fba45ee73ae0bcfb7a5cd2480bf6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR originally changed per-agent subagent model config to reuse `AgentModelSchema`, then reverted that source change and now only adds schema tests around agent/subagent model `timeoutMs` handling.

Reproducibility: yes. for the contract conflict: source inspection shows current main rejects agent/subagent model `timeoutMs` through `AgentModelSchema`, and the merged follow-up locks that behavior in. I did not execute parser tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is a maintainer close-or-retarget decision because the protected PR is superseded by a merged contract change, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(config): allow subagent model timeouts per agent
target.body:
## Summary
- reuse the shared `AgentModelSchema` for per-agent `subagents.model`
- allow per-agent subagent model objects to include `timeoutMs`, matching defaults
- add schema coverage for per-agent subagent model timeout config

Fixes #83291.

## Real behavior proof

![PR 83319 before/after proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83319-fresh/pr-83319/pr-83319-fix-config-allow-subagent-model-timeouts-per-age-before-after-proof.png)

Fresh deterministic proof artifacts:
- Summary: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83319-fresh/pr-83319/summary.txt
- Before/source proof log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83319-fresh/pr-83319/before-source-proof.log
- After/PR proof log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83319-fresh/pr-83319/after-pr-83319.log

- Behavior or issue addressed: per-agent `agents.list[].subagents.model` should accept the same model object shape as `agents.defaults.subagents.model`, including `timeoutMs`.
- Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu OpenClaw worktree at `/root/src/openclaw-branches/fix-subagent-model-timeout-83291`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/schema.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`.
- Evidence after fix (terminal capture):

```text
RUN  v4.1.6 /root/src/openclaw-branches/fix-subagent-model-timeout-83291

✓ runtime-config  ../../src/config/schema.test.ts (40 tests) 1274ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  40 passed (40)

[check:changed] src/config/schema.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts: core production
Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
```

- Observed result after fix: `OpenClawSchema.parse` accepts `agents.list[0].subagents.model` with `{ primary: "openai/gpt-5.5", timeoutMs: 30000 }` and preserves the parsed shape.
- What was not tested: live agent runtime execution with that timeout value.
- Before evidence (terminal/code capture from `origin/main`):

```text
src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts before this patch defined per-agent subagent model inline as:
  z.union([
    z.string(),
    z.object({
      primary: z.string().optional(),
      fallbacks: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
    }).strict(),
  ])

That strict object omitted `timeoutMs`, while defaults already used AgentModelSchema.
```

## Root Cause
- Root cause: per-agent subagent model schema duplicated a narrower inline model shape instead of reusing `AgentModelSchema`.
- Missing detection / guardrail: no schema regression test covered `timeoutMs` under `agents.list[].subagents.model`.
- Contributing context: defaults had already moved to the shared model schema, but the per-agent path drifted.

## Regression Test Plan
- Coverage level that should have caught this: unit/schema test.
- Target test or file: `src/config/schema.test.ts`.
- Scenario the test should lock in: per-agent subagent model objects accept `timeoutMs` and preserve it after parsing.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: the bug is isolated to config schema validation.

## Validation
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/schema.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
